import re, unicodedata, math
orig_span = "وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُ أَهْلَهُ وَمِثْلَهُم مَعَهُ رَحْمَةً مِنْ عِنْدِنَا وَضَرَبَ اللَهُ امْرَأً مِنْ قَرْوَ عَجِيبٍ فَأَتبَعَهُ كَلِمَةُ رَبِّهِ وَهُدِيَهُ إِلَى صِدْقٍ"

def normalize_ar(s):
    # remove tashkeel
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if not unicodedata.category(ch).startswith('M'))
    # remove tatweel and punctuation-like
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # unify arabic forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

norm_span = normalize_ar(orig_span)
norm_span

sad43 = [v for v in quran if v["surah_id"]==38 and v["ayah_id"]==43][0]["ayah_text"]
anb84 = [v for v in quran if v["surah_id"]==21 and v["ayah_id"]==84][0]["ayah_text"]
norm_sad43 = normalize_ar(sad43)
norm_anb84 = normalize_ar(anb84)
norm_sad43, norm_anb84

sad43_text = [v for v in quran if v["surah_id"]==38 and v["ayah_id"]==43][0]["ayah_text"]
sad43_text
